RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. A R G U E D. DEFENDANT AQUATIC TECHNOLOGIES, INC. AND DENNIS FLAUM'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is taken UNDER SUBMISSION and is CONTINUED to 02/18/05 in Dept. 301 at 9:30 AM. No further pleadings shall be filed in this matter. If testimony is required at the 02/18/05 hearing, the Court will so advise Counsel. (301/JLW/ACC-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-05-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
James M. Sitkin, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bay Area Linen & Valet Service, Inc.
Plaintiff's witness: Sue Yuen, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence and declarations presented in court, the Court taken this matter under submission.
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court.

Nov. 4, 2004
Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Aquatic Technologies, Inc. and Dennis Flaum as follows:
Damages $335,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $47,113.29
Costs $1,270.00 for a total of $383,383.29
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
